name: Sourcepoint
description: Sourcepoint — Consent management and privacy compliance platform for publishers managing GDPR, TCF 2.0, and CCPA consent.

seo.title: Sourcepoint — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Sourcepoint: Sourcepoint — Consent management and privacy compliance platform for publishers managing GDPR, TCF 2.0, and CCPA consent.

when_to_use: IAB TCF 2.0 CMP for publisher programmatic advertising consent
GDPR consent management for media and publishing platforms
CCPA opt-out mechanism for US ad-supported digital properties
Privacy orchestration across first and third-party data stacks
Consent analytics for publisher monetization compliance review

pros: Publisher-grade CMP with full IAB TCF 2.2 support
Messaging layer goes beyond consent for paywalls and preferences
Detailed vendor management and audit trails
Flexible across GDPR, CCPA, and state laws
cons: Complexity demands a dedicated privacy ops owner
Pricing squarely at the enterprise end
Implementation can span weeks to months
Overkill for sites without ad monetization
review.verdict: The CMP of choice for serious publishers — small sites should not even bother with a demo.
review.best_for: Large publishers monetizing via programmatic ads and subscriptions
review.not_for: SMBs and SaaS sites without ad revenue
